---
title: 导出QuPath快照
subtitle: 导出QuPath快照（snapshot）的五种方法
date: 2026-03-23
toc-depth: 4
toc-expand: true
lang: en
---

## 1，通过QuPath菜单

`File` &rarr; `Export snapshot...`

<center>
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="37%"}
![&rarr; `Main window screenshot...`](images/2026-03-19_main_window_screenshot.png){style="width: 98%;"}
:::
::: {.column width="37%"}
![&rarr; `Main window content...`](images/2026-03-19_main_window_content.png){style="width: 98%;"}
:::
::: {.column width="26%"}
![&rarr; `Current viewer content...`](images/2026-03-19_current_viewer_content.png){style="width: 95%;"}
:::
:::
</center>

## 2，通过Extensions

`Extensions` &rarr; `Snapshot helper`

<center>
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![&rarr; `Save snapshot`](images/2026-03-19_save_snapshot.png){style="width: 99%;"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![&rarr; `Save screenshot`](images/2026-03-19_save_screenshot.png){style="width: 95%;"}
:::
:::
</center>

## 3，通过groovy script

<center>
::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="37%"}
![Full screenshot](images/2026-03-19_script_-fullscreenshot.png){style="width: 98%;"}
:::
::: {.column width="37%"}
![Snapshot](images/2026-03-19_script_-snapshot.png){style="width: 98%;"}
:::
::: {.column width="26%"}
![Viewer snapshot](images/2026-03-19_script_viewer-snapshot.png){style="width: 95%;"}
:::
:::
</center>

```
// QuPath v0.7.0

import qupath.lib.gui.tools.GuiTools

// Set directory
var path = buildFilePath(PROJECT_BASE_DIR, "images")
mkdirs(path)

// Export full screenshot
var name2 = "full-screenshot.png"
writeImage(
        GuiTools.makeFullScreenshot(),
        buildFilePath(path, name2)
)

// Export snapshot (main window content)
var name3 = "snapshot.png"
writeImage(
        GuiTools.makeSnapshot(),
        buildFilePath(path, name3)
)

// Export viewer snapshot
var name1 = "viewer-snapshot.png"
writeImage(
        GuiTools.makeViewerSnapshot(),
        buildFilePath(path, name1)
)

println "Done!"
```

## 4，&#8862; + `shift` + `S`唤起Windows自带的`Snipping Tool`

通过`Snipping Tool`截取（QuPath）任意窗口区域。

<center>
![](images/2026-03-21_snippint-tool.png){style="width: 50%;"}
</center>

## 5，`alt` + `space`唤起`uTools` 

需要提前安装uTools。

唤起`uTools`后，在输入框输入`jietu`。三种工具都可以试试。

<center>
![uTools提供的3种截图工具。](images/2026-03-21_utools_snapshot.png)
</center>

::: {.callout-note icon="true"}
方法1 - 3为QuPath特异的方法；方法4和5为泛泛的方法。
:::

[给我买杯茶🍵](给我买杯茶.qmd)
